data.title: Telenor Executive Jannicke Hilland Increases Shareholding in Insider Trade
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Telenor ( (GB:0G8C) ) has issued an announcement.

Telenor ASA reported that Executive Vice President and primary insider Jannicke Hilland purchased 1,968 company shares on 28 April 2026 at a price of NOK 152.60 per share. Following the transaction, her total shareholding increased to 14,817 shares, a move that signals strengthened insider alignment with shareholder interests and triggers mandatory disclosure under EU and Norwegian securities regulations.

The transaction underscores regulatory transparency requirements for trades by primary insiders in listed companies, reinforcing market confidence in Telenor’s governance practices. While the purchase is relatively modest in size, such insider buying is often monitored by investors as a potential indicator of management’s confidence in the company’s future prospects and operational trajectory.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:0G8C) stock is a Hold with a NOK160.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Telenor stock, see the GB:0G8C Stock Forecast page.

More about Telenor

Telenor ASA is a Norwegian telecommunications company that provides mobile and fixed-line services, data communication, and digital solutions. The group operates primarily in the Nordics and selected Asian markets, focusing on connectivity, network infrastructure, and related digital services for consumers and businesses.

Average Trading Volume: 1,462,318

Current Market Cap: NOK224.8B

data.title: American Fusion Launches Government Procurement Services Revenue Segment
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

American Fusion ( (AMFN) ) has shared an update.

Effective January 23, 2026, the company amended its governing documents to change its corporate name from Renewal Fuels, Inc. to American Fusion Inc., and on February 5, 2026 it completed domestication into Texas, following its conversion out of Delaware on February 10. In line with these changes, FINRA processed a related corporate action, including a ticker change to AMFN that became effective March 17, 2026, while the company’s fiscal year remained unchanged.

On April 28, 2026, American Fusion announced the launch of a Government Procurement Services segment and its first revenue‑generating transaction, a roughly $58,000 purchase order to act as a U.S. source‑of‑supply vendor of phase noise analyzers for a Canadian Department of National Defence / QETE requirement. Although not material financially, the deal marks the company’s entry into government, defense, and institutional procurement channels alongside its core Texatron fusion energy development, supporting a multi‑channel strategy to build credibility and near‑term revenue in strategic markets.

More about American Fusion

American Fusion Inc. (OTC: AMFN), formerly Renewal Fuels, Inc., is an advanced energy platform company focused on developing and commercializing fusion energy technologies through its wholly owned subsidiary, Kepler Fusion Technologies. The company aims to build a scalable, infrastructure‑grade fusion energy platform, centered on its proprietary Texatron aneutronic fusion technology for industrial, commercial, and grid‑constrained applications.

Following its merger with Kepler Fusion Technologies, American Fusion rebranded from Renewal Fuels and emphasizes disciplined intellectual property development and long‑term commercial deployment. The company positions itself at the intersection of defense, energy, and infrastructure ecosystems, seeking to leverage both its core fusion capabilities and adjacent technical supply chains to establish a durable market presence.

Average Trading Volume: 13,568,593

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $196.3M

Learn more about AMFN stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Sage Group plc ( (GB:SGE) ) has shared an update.

The Sage Group has continued executing its previously announced share buyback programme, repurchasing 415,697 ordinary shares on 28 April 2026 via Morgan Stanley on the London Stock Exchange and various multilateral trading facilities. The shares were acquired at prices between 892.6p and 906.8p, with a volume-weighted average price of 899.74p.

Sage plans to cancel all of the repurchased shares, effectively reducing its share count and potentially enhancing earnings per share for remaining investors. The transaction underscores the company’s ongoing capital return strategy and may signal management’s confidence in Sage’s valuation and long-term prospects, providing incremental support for the stock in the near term.

data.title: Endesa Names Gianni Vittorio Armani as New Chief Executive Officer
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Endesa SA ( (ES:ELE) ) is now available.

Endesa has announced that its Board of Directors has appointed Gianni Vittorio Armani as the company’s new Chief Executive Officer, effective 28 April 2026. The decision was taken unanimously following a report from the Appointments and Remuneration Committee, underscoring strong internal support for the leadership change.

In line with his new role as an executive director, Armani has stepped down from his position on Endesa’s Sustainability and Corporate Governance Committee. The reshuffle signals a consolidation of executive responsibilities at the top of the company and may influence how Endesa balances strategic decision-making with oversight in sustainability and governance matters.

More about Endesa SA

Endesa, S.A. is a Spanish energy utility that operates primarily in the electricity sector. The company focuses on power generation, distribution and supply, serving residential, commercial and industrial customers across its core markets in Spain and potentially other European regions.

data.title: Ena S.p.A. Fails Quorum on First Call, Reschedules Shareholders’ Meeting
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Enav SpA ( (IT:ENAV) ) has provided an announcement.

Ena S.p.A., a real estate administration company listed on Euronext Growth Milan, announced that its Ordinary Shareholders’ Meeting scheduled on first call for 28 April 2026 was not held due to the legal quorum not being reached. The company plans to hold the meeting on second call on 29 April 2026 via telecommunication to approve the 2025 financial statements, acknowledge the consolidated accounts, and decide on the allocation of net profit, a step that is important for dividend policy and financial transparency to shareholders.

The rescheduled meeting underscores the reliance on quorum-dependent governance processes typical of smaller listed companies and highlights the importance of shareholder participation in approving annual results. Outcomes of the second-call meeting will influence how Ena distributes its 2025 earnings and may affect investor expectations regarding returns and the company’s capital allocation strategy.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:ENAV) stock is a Buy with a EUR5.85 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Enav SpA stock, see the IT:ENAV Stock Forecast page.

More about Enav SpA

Ena S.p.A. is a leading player in the real estate administration sector and is listed on the Euronext Growth Milan market. The company focuses on managing and administering real estate assets, serving investors and stakeholders active in Italy’s property and capital markets.

Average Trading Volume: 655,302

data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

poLight ASA ( (DE:3OL0) ) has issued an announcement.

PoLight ASA has released its 2025 Annual Report after board approval, confirming that the final financial statements are in line with figures presented in February and choosing not to propose a dividend for the year. The publication underscores a cautious capital allocation stance, which may signal continued focus on investment and growth rather than shareholder payouts in the near term.

The report is now available on the company’s website, providing investors and other stakeholders with detailed insight into poLight’s performance over the past year. The decision not to distribute dividends could influence investor sentiment, especially for income-focused shareholders, while growth-oriented investors may interpret it as a commitment to funding further development of its tunable optics technology.

More about poLight ASA

PoLight ASA is a Norway-based technology company listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange that develops proprietary tunable optics solutions. Its flagship product, the TLens autofocus lens, is designed to mimic the human eye and is used in applications such as AR and MR glasses, smartphones, barcode scanners, machine vision systems and medical equipment, offering fast focus, low power consumption and a compact footprint.

Commerce Bancshares ( (CBSH) ) has issued an update.

At its annual meeting held on April 24, 2026, Commerce Bancshares shareholders elected four directors—Blackford F. Brauer, W. Kyle Chapman, Karen L. Daniel and David W. Kemper—to the 2029 class, while the remaining board members continued their terms. Shareholders also ratified KPMG LLP as the independent registered public accounting firm for 2026 and approved, on an advisory basis, the company’s executive compensation program, signaling broad investor support for the current leadership and governance structure.

On April 28, 2026, the company announced that its board had expanded the existing share repurchase authorization to allow buybacks of up to 7.5 million shares of common stock, including the remaining capacity from a prior authorization. The enlarged repurchase program underscores management’s confidence in the firm’s financial position and provides a potential boost to shareholder returns through reduced share count and enhanced capital management flexibility.

data.title: Piramal Pharma Posts FY26 Loss but Sees Recovery Momentum Across Key Businesses
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Piramal Pharma Limited ( (IN:PPLPHARMA) ) has shared an announcement.

Piramal Pharma reported FY26 consolidated revenue from operations of ₹8,869 crore, down 3% year-on-year, with EBITDA falling 28% and the company posting a net loss after an impairment charge on intangible assets under development. Revenue was pressured by inventory destocking, slower early-stage CDMO orders and softer ex‑U.S. inhalation anesthesia demand, though management highlighted underlying growth when adjusting for destocking and noted stable net debt.

The company invested US$94 million in capex during FY26, including ongoing expansions at its Lexington and Riverview facilities, and is seeing strong customer interest in these sites. Management pointed to recovering biopharma funding driving better RFP and order inflows in CDMO, the Kenalog acquisition and ex‑U.S. anesthesia ramp-up as key growth drivers in CHG, and continued margin-accretive growth in consumer healthcare, asserting that all three businesses are well positioned for improved revenue, EBITDA and PAT performance in FY27.

More about Piramal Pharma Limited

Piramal Pharma Limited is a global pharmaceutical, health and wellness company with diversified operations across contract development and manufacturing (CDMO), complex hospital generics (CHG) and consumer healthcare (PCH). The company focuses on biopharma services, inhalation anesthesia and branded consumer products, with a growing presence in both U.S. and ex‑U.S. markets.

Average Trading Volume: 217,020

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: 219.9B INR

For a thorough assessment of PPLPHARMA stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
